required_negative_cases.mutation: mutate accepted entry canonical state hash without recomputing entry hash
remove the only accepted head while retaining accepted_head_entry_hash
present conflicting successor for the same sequence position
append an already accepted entry again
change materialized head hash away from ledger accepted head

claim_boundary: D5 proves append-only lineage replay, accepted-head calculation, and recovery_or_quarantine disposition for head disagreement; witnesses, receipts, and anti-equivocation are later WPs.
